issue_clusters.name: Feature Enhancement and Customization Demands
issue_clusters.summary: Users seek enhancements like mobile support, custom workflows, improved data analytics, and better report export options to better adapt to their business processes.
issue_clusters.recommendation: Gather detailed enhancement requests, prioritize high-impact features based on user feedback, and introduce customization options to increase flexibility and satisfaction.

issue_clusters.name: Integration and API Challenges
issue_clusters.summary: Users face difficulties integrating third-party tools, lack of API interfaces, and unclear documentation, hindering system extensibility and workflow efficiency.
issue_clusters.recommendation: Enhance integration capabilities by expanding API offerings, improving documentation clarity, and providing dedicated support to facilitate seamless tool connections.

issue_clusters.name: Core Feature Gaps and Mismatches
issue_clusters.summary: Users report missing critical features such as reporting, multilingual support, and basic functionalities, leading to unmet business needs and potential churn.
issue_clusters.recommendation: Prioritize development of missing core features, conduct thorough needs analysis to ensure alignment with user requirements, and communicate roadmaps to address gaps.

issue_clusters.name: User Interface Complexity
issue_clusters.summary: Users find the interface complex and difficult to navigate, with concerns about aesthetic elements like icons, impacting overall user experience and adoption.
issue_clusters.recommendation: Simplify the user interface through usability testing, redesign icons for better aesthetics, and provide guided onboarding to reduce complexity and improve engagement.
